arts.ttl: 'I regret coming' - Chelsea flop unleashes ruthless transfer rant after Victor Osimhen blow - football.london
arts.sum: Former Chelsea star Hakim Ziyech has publicly stated in a brutal verdict that he is planning to leave Galatasaray in January. Just a few minutes into his cameo, the 31-year-old had a golden chance to double his side's lead, given to them by former Blues star Michy Batshuayi, but he missed an open goal after being played through by Victor Osimhen.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea are now looking at £41m Champions League defender as a target for 2025

arts.ttl: Chelsea ready to pay £50 million in order to sign Frenchman from Euro giants
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly interested in signing the French midfielder Youssouf Fofana from AC Milan. Fofana has been a key player for Milan since joining them for a fee of around €20 million last summer. His performances have attracted the attention of the Blues. According to Fichajes, Chelsea have set their sights on the French midfielder […] The post Chelsea ready to pay £50 million in order to sign Frenchman from Euro giants appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: I was forced to leave Chelsea last summer but now I have the chance to prove Enzo Maresca wrong
arts.sum: "Chelsea are a huge football club, one of the biggest in the world, along with Atletico . "I’ve felt very wanted and appreciated, which is important for any footballer," he admitted in late September, perhaps as a slight dig at his former club.
